topic: Some, any, much, many, few y little
title: Much, many, and a lot of
objective: Elegir much, many o a lot of para hablar de cantidades grandes en contextos cotidianos.

activities.prompt: How ___ people are in the room?
activities.feedback_correct: People es contable plural; usamos How many.
activities.feedback_incorrect: People puede contarse, así que usa many.

activities.feedback_correct: Time es no contable en esta expresión.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Time no se cuenta directamente; usa How much.

activities.feedback_correct: A lot of funciona con work en una afirmación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Work es no contable y la frase es afirmativa.

activities.feedback_correct: Much se usa con traffic en una negación.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Traffic es no contable en este contexto.

activities.prompt: How much students are in your class?
activities.correct_answer: How many students are in your class?
activities.feedback_incorrect: Cambia much por many porque students puede contarse.

activities.prompt: There are many shops downtown, but there isn't much parking. The area has a lot of restaurants too.
activities.question: What is difficult to find downtown?
activities.feedback_correct: There isn't much parking indica que hay poco estacionamiento.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la información después de but.

activities.prompt: How many books? How much time? I have a lot of books. I don't have much time.
activities.feedback_correct: La diferencia entre contables y no contables se escucha con claridad.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Practica many con plural y much con sustantivos no contables.

activities.prompt: David has a lot of friends and many books. He has much homework this week, so he doesn't have much free time.
activities.question: What does David have little time for?
activities.feedback_correct: La última parte explica que tiene poco tiempo libre.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Busca la expresión relacionada con time.

activities.prompt: Write six sentences comparing two places. Use many with countable nouns, much with uncountable nouns, and a lot of in affirmative sentences.
evaluation_criteria: a lot of in affirmative context
activities.feedback_correct: Elegiste los cuantificadores según el sustantivo y el tipo de oración.
activities.feedback_incorrect: Primero identifica si el sustantivo es contable y si la oración es afirmativa, negativa o interrogativa.

activities.prompt: Compare two cities with the AI. Discuss how many people, shops, parks, and how much traffic, noise, and free time there are.
success_criteria: uses a lot of in affirmations
activities.feedback_correct: Comparas lugares con cantidades de manera natural.
activities.feedback_incorrect: La IA te pide reformular la frase según el tipo de sustantivo.
